issues: 4H trend label says bullish but ADX 19.94 and bearish EMA alignment contradict — indicator aggregation logic needs review
1D structure detection reports higher highs/lows while labeling bearish — lag or logic bug in structure module
On-chain tx volume 76% below 30d avg with no cause attribution — weekend effect should be auto-flagged not left ambiguous
Hash rate 7d and 30d averages identical at 966.6 EH/s — data source staleness not caught by pipeline
Risk Judge output truncated mid-sentence on hard limit checklist — process failure that could mask a blocking signal
Existing SHORT at 17.6x effective leverage breaches both 15x swing and 10x position hard limits — should have been blocked at entry
Liquidation at ~1.1x ATR vs required >2x — same failure pattern flagged in Feb 23 reflection, not yet fixed in code
improvements: Add automated hard-limit gate in executor that rejects orders breaching leverage/liquidation rules BEFORE placement — human override only
Fix 4H trend aggregation to require ADX > 25 before labeling trend strength as 'strong'
Add weekend/holiday flag to on-chain data module to contextualize volume drops automatically
Add output completeness check — if Risk Judge or any node output is truncated, halt pipeline and alert
Deduplicate hash rate sources or add staleness detection when 7d and 30d averages match exactly
summary: The system produced substantive analysis with a genuinely useful bull/bear debate — the bear correctly identified the 1H-only structural support as insufficient for swing timeframes, and the FM rightly flagged two hard-limit breaches on the existing short. Data quality was degraded by contradictory trend labels and stale on-chain metrics, but the risk team caught real dangers. The most critical issue is that hard-limit breaches (17.6x leverage, 1.1x ATR liquidation) are being flagged in prose but not enforced in code — the same failure pattern from Feb 23 is repeating, which means the reflection loop isn't closing into actual system changes.
